details.attacks: 1 x attack (1d3 by claws or weapon)
details.special: PSI: Clairaudience WT: Chameleon Power, All-Round Vision Powers: 3 Rank: 1st Leader: Groups of 15+ are led by a Leader. The leader may have magical items: 5% chance per level for each magic item table. Running: Silt Runners tend to attack by overrunning their opponents, they may run to their targets at 120’ a round up to four times a day. PSI: WT: Detect Life, Chameleon Power Powers: 4 Poison Resi

system.description:
The razorwing is a small-bodied slate blue bat with large, crescent-shaped wings that have razor-sharp leading edges.
